info.longBusinessSummary: Welsbach Technology Metals Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. The company intends to effect a merger, stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It focuses on the technology metals and energy transition metals markets. Welsbach Technology Metals Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Chicago, Illinois. Welsbach Technology Metals Acquisition Corp. is a subsidiary of Welsbach Acquisition Holdings LLC.

companyOfficers.name: Mr. Daniel Mamadou Blanco B.A., M.Sc.
companyOfficers.title: CEO & Chairman of the Board
